programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Nigel Havers hosts as five dealers battle each other to buy items brought in by the public including a horse racing game, a silver tea set and a 1970s miniature farmyard

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following the brokers at UK Sothebys International Realty. The super prime property market is booming and competition to court ultra-high-net-worth individuals with money to spend is fierce. This programme features a grade I listed terraced home for sale overlooking Regents Park Lake. Built in 1822 and designed by renowned Regency architect John Nash, its worth an eye-watering £29million, making it one of the most expensive homes in the UK. Also in London, managing director of UK Sothebys International Realty Guy is invited to sell a rather unusual houseboat boasting five bedrooms and three bathrooms

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues his battle to restore the failing Towns Inn in Harpers Ferry, West Virginia. After witnessing abysmal food hygiene practices in the restaurant, the chef is left in disbelief as he uncovers terrifying cleanliness issues throughout the hotel. Can he win over stubborn owner Karan Townsend and persuade her to turn things round?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Adventure reality series where contestants hunt each other through a forest, with one side winning if they can evade detection and the other seeking to capture them. In this opening episode, the players arrive at basecamp and meet for the very first time before being split into prey and predators. As the first hunt gets underway, an initial alliance is shattered by betrayal

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Jack Dee and GK Barry, and Jason Williamson from Sleaford Mods for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie makes a beehive piñata and a hot air balloon-inspired paper garland, perfect for a childrens party

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect tries to unlock the potential of old properties. He starts out in Stroud, where Phil and Leighla are transforming their ramshackle, listed Georgian farmhouse with an industrial-style extension. George also pays a visit to Wootton Bassett, where he helps a couple flip the layout of their Victorian end-of-terrace home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer helps a couple who are at loggerheads over their priorities for their next property, with Becki wanting a ready-to-move-into family home, while Craig is looking for a bargain project in the popular suburbs of south Manchester. Kirstie Allsopp meets newlyweds Chris and Amy in Cheshire, who are looking to buy their first home together and want something semi-rural in pricey areas including Knutsford, Lymm and Frodsham

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of three. Don the plumber asks Rebecca to marry him, while Sam sees Diane on a TV awards show and makes the decision to get back in touch with her

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of three. Woodys new post as a city counsellor enables him to help Norm get a new job, while an unexpected turn of events could lead to a reconciliation for Sam and Diane

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Three
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, Sam and Diane are plagued by doubts about the idea of getting back together, while rest of the regulars gang ponder the meaning of life

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy invites her brother for dinner, but he ends up outstaying his welcome, forcing Robert to take desperate measures to eject him from the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra begin telling lies in a bid to cover up previous falsehoods, but Marie soon suspects what they are doing. Comedy, with Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes a dislike to KACLs newest presenter, sharp-tongued radio psychiatrist Dr Nora. Award-winning episode of the comedy series, guest starring Christine Baranski and Piper Laurie

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: When a Man Loves Two Women
programme.desc: Cassandra Stone, the woman Frasier dated on Valentines Day, agrees to go out with him again - but the appearance of his former girlfriend Faye, who has been out of the country for a while, complicates matters. Comedy, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Amy Brenneman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne agrees to marry Donny, but has a vision that suggests he is wrong for her, and tempts fate by turning to Niles for advice on how to proceed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Shut Out in Seattle - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Daphnes engagement to Donny leaves Niles feeling down, so he seeks solace in the arms of a younger woman. Frasier keeps getting his girlfriends name wrong, Martins relationship with Bonnie turns sour, and Roz cannot bring herself to break up with Bulldog

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help the owners of Grumpy George, an English pub located in Georgetown, Texas. The pub is owned by Karen and her husband Christian, who admit that they have little idea how to run a restaurant. Chef Michael has complete control of the kitchen and the menu, but his area of expertise is Puerto Rican food and he thinks that British cuisine is bland. As a result, the restaurant lacks a quintessential British identity and money is getting tighter by the day

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head to Worcestershire where Max transforms old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon makes a trendy bar bench out of old barrels

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Janice says an emotional goodbye to some of her beloved Hampshire Down sheep, and Matts plan to build a patio and seating area in front of the farmhouse begins to take shape. Meanwhile, with the body of the Dodge fully stripped, Matt and the restoration garage team face the challenge of separating it from its chassis, and Nicola accompanies Mike on a shopping trip in search of ingredients for a celebratory paella

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Bev and Errol are keen to find their very own Spanish holiday home near the Mar Menor. Theyve chosen the area because of its beautiful climate and great value for money. Jasmine Harman shows them some options for their maximum budget of £65,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Colin and Paul make progress with their Bulgarian barn conversion and Jo and Ken open their hotel doors to the flamboyance of flamenco in Spain. Mother-and-daughter duo Becky and Kay host their first yoga retreat and in France, Jon and Angela turn an old shed into a wedding venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick hosts the weeks third visit at Impossible Motel in the centre of York, where he offers a range of quirky rooms including rock star suites complete with hot tubs and an eyebrow-raising dungeon room with a bed on chains

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Natalia hopes her Nineties-themed evening will be a cut above the rest as the West Country diners gather for the third time this week. However, her spicy twist on a prawn cocktail get Peppe all hot under the collar, while Jos no-nonsense nitpicking gets her into hot water with the hostess

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Danni Menzies revisits best friends Sarah and Jo on Corfu to find out if they are enjoying the fruits of their labour at their olive grove house. Leah Charles-King sees how Hannah and Gareth are getting on in Salobreña

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: The property expert charts the experiences of people who have bought homes at auction. In Guildford, she meets Alison and Michael, who were forced to sell their old home when the interest rate shot up. But will their auction buy, with its unanticipated pitfalls, give them the financial freedom theyre looking for? She also meets a couple tackling a creaky seven-bedroom BandB in Cornwall and visits an old council loo in Newport, south Wales, thats been transformed into a unique performance space by local resident Janet

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emmas new shop is flourishing - and so is romance with the handsome David. But love has let her down before, and she finds herself torn between following her heart and revenge on the Fairleys. Meanwhile, a newly sober Adele crashes back into Fairley Hall, jeopardising Adam and Olivias affair and Edwins upcoming marriage to Priya. In the 1970s, Emma commands her granddaughter Paula to break off her romance with Jim Fairley, forcing Paula to choose between her grandmother and her lover

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Analysis of never-before-seen letters from Ian Brady and Myra Hindley, written over their five decades in prison, and personal accounts from those who knew them. The first episode features an eyewitness account of the last murder from Myra Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith, and contributions from 1960s pop singer Janie Jones, who befriended Hindley in prison and conducted a 40-year-long correspondence with both Hindley and Brady

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Following the arrest of Brady for a single murder, police discover a tape recording of a 10-year-old girl being tortured and realise they are investigating a string of murders. Eyewitness Clive Entwistle describes the first police search of the moors above Manchester. He was present when the remains of the girl on the tape were found, and explains how police used photographs of the serial-killing couple posing on the moors to locate the body of the third known victim, a 12-year-old boy

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith and journalist Clive Entwistle describe the killers trial in 1966, and recall the tension in court as they faced justice, including the moment when a tape recording of a girl being tortured was played. The film also documents Myra Hindleys life in prison, and her protracted, unsuccessful campaign to secure her parole

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotels restaurant and ice-cream parlour are failing. Gordon confronts owner Brents inappropriate and miserly behaviour, but is it enough to repair the establishments reputation?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The players discover who is the first to be culled. The group barely have time to recover from this shocking revelation before day two dawns and the hunt begins again. One friendship faces the ultimate test in the heat of the moment, while the breaking of a secret deal leads to a fiery clash back at base. With loyalties divided and trust called into question, the players with power must choose who to keep in the contest

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect helps more people make their period homes fit for modern life. George looks to Japan for inspiration as he helps Rachel and Sarah with the ground floor of their Victorian terraced home in Worthing. In Worcestershire, he meets a young couple who have bitten off more than they can chew in the shape of a listed 17th-century cottage

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey heads to Bradford to help a busy multigenerational household, who dream of creating a spacious kitchen diner where they can host extended family feasts. Instead, after encountering problems, they are cooking in a building site. Meanwhile, at Pickle Cottage in Essex, Stacey pushes herself to tackle a new DIY skill, applying her own micro-cement

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of first-time buyers searching for properties in south London. Niki and Rob have £450,000 and want a home with enough space to allow them to start a family, while Georgie and Louis have been commuting from Surrey for years and feel the time is right to move to the capital. But what will they find with a £220,000 budget?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers and her husband-to-be Sumner Sloan call in for a drink at a bar before setting off for their wedding. However, he decides to return to his ex-wife, so owner Sam Malone offers the jilted woman a job as a waitress. Starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam tries to find a more intelligent woman in a bid to impress Diane, who is scornful of the brainless bimbos he usually dates. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla attacks a customer for insulting the Boston Red Sox, ending with a lawsuit demanding either she be fired or Sam loses the bar. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amys parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her fathers drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The kids damage Rays dictionary, prompting Frank to tell everyone about the time Ray ruined his prized jazz collection. However, he discovers that he may not have been the culprit all along

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra helps to plan a recruitment party at Franks lodge, leading Ray to grumble about how much time she is spending away from home. Comedy, starring Patricia Hearten and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Shut Out in Seattle - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles and Roz take extreme action to solve dilemmas in their respective love lives. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Niles meet the new woman in Frasiers life - and discover to their surprise that she looks just like his mother. Comedy, guest starring Rita Wilson, alongside Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Frasier inadvertently offer to pay for Daphnes wedding, while Niles sinks into gloom as the marriage approaches and tries to console himself by dating someone new - unaware she is a prostitute. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The station shock-jocks decide to play practical jokes - and Frasiers pompous manner makes him the ideal target for their dubious humour. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Cedar Creek, a small, rural town in Texas, Gordon tries to help the owners of Leos Italian Grill rediscover their dream of a vibrant restaurant. After his son died, Leos passion faded, leading to poor food quality and service. Gordon sets out to re-ignite and partner Michelles love for the business and restore the restaurant to its former glory

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the north of Wales where they meet Sue, who is clearing out her late husbands antique shop stock. Henry manages to find a pedal car, while Simon takes a toy yacht

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: In summer, the sheep are sheared and Matt makes plans for a new home for the chickens that will give them access to free-range grazing. The family attempts the first honey harvest. It is movie night in the courtyard as the footage captured by the wildlife cameras in the woodlands is finally revealed. With the body of the Dodge lifted off its chassis, the engine at its heart has been revealed

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Nikki and Gordon to search for a holiday home on the Maltese island of Gozo for their budget of £350,000. Ben has five impressive properties up his sleeve; will any of them deliver the Mediterranean dream?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, hoteliers Jo and Ken try to bring in a profit with their musical side hustle. In Bulgaria, Colin faces a difficult decision, while in France, rain looks to threaten the success of for Jon and Angelas wedding

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay at Beach Suites in Southport for the weeks final visit, where host Dans no-nonsense approach to a classic seaside getaway proves popular. The group is less positive about issues with cleanliness at the venue and receives a surprise when black belt Dan reveals they will be spending the afternoon at his martial arts academy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the penultimate night in the West Country, account manager Richard hopes to knock the socks off his competitors with his top-notch British bistro fare. He goes all out to finesse his food, but his tagliatelle leaves globetrotter Kirstein tongue-tied and Peppe unconvinced. A revealing chat sees Natalia confess to an unusual upper-class alias, which prompts Jo into a game of one-upmanship. And what will the guests make of their hosts secret bedroom pastime?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman heads to Haute-Vienne in France to visit Gary and Lynn, who with the help of Danni Menzies bought a holiday home there in 2021 for their £120,000. She sees how theyve settled into their maison, the changes theyve made and whether they still have the lawnmower that cut them a good deal. Lee Juggurnauth is on the coast of Almería in Spain with Lorna and Brian, who he helped find a new home in 2021, for their £160,000. Now, Lees back to see how Lorna, Brian and their son Danny are settling into their new life

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: George meets Kazal and Eleena, who both grew up and lived in the West Midlands but have ended up all over the world for work. Now, after 14 years of living in Dubai, they have come home to Solihull to take on the challenge of restoring and massively extending a run-down house in a desirable street, to create the ultimate hub for hosting family gatherings - but will their plans survive massive cost overruns, mistakes with building plans and having to live in a building site throughout a bitter winter?

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: At Fairley Hall, death has left a void. Grief-stricken Gerald is in serious debt to a mysterious lender, with the Fairley mill tied up as collateral. Emma has settled into her marriage to Joe Lowther and works tirelessly to be a brilliant wife and mother but theres tension in the household; Joe knows her work will always come first. While Emma prepares the perfect Christmas for her family, her unrelenting obsession with work and revenge brings danger to her door. In the 1970s, as Emma recovers from a heart attack, an oblivious Paula doubles down on her love affair with Jim

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Pedestrian Jane is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham with multiple life-threatening injuries after being severely injured in a hit-and-run. The major trauma team work hard to stabilise Jane, who has a fractured pelvis. Acrobatic performer Claudia is in AandE with a broken wrist after falling while practising a routine, and 93-year-old Dorothy is rushed to resus after falling at home and breaking her leg

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 65-year-old woman is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being found collapsed in the park. Domestic cleaner Deanna, a long-serving member of the AandE team, shares her struggles in early life, including overcoming addiction, before finding her purpose working in the hospital. The doctors treat a teenager with a burn on her hand

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: A fallen scrambler with head and neck injuries is precariously lodged at the edge of a waterfall for several hours and moving him threatens further problems. However, with the cold mountain water bringing him close to hypothermia, the team has little choice. On the other side of the Lakes, a local marathon brings its own challenges as temperatures soar towards 30 degrees Celsius

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Day three of the reality contest gets under way, with eight remaining in the battle to win up to £100,000. While one contestant approaches the upcoming hunt with supreme confidence, another decides its time to abandon their role as underdog and come out fighting. Strategies shift and fortunes flip in the forest, and a dramatic twist turns the game on its head, putting even the strongest players in peril ahead of a tense and unexpected climax

programme.title: Land (2021)
programme.desc: Edee, in the aftermath of an unfathomable event, finds herself unable to stay connected to the world she once knew and in the face of that uncertainty, retreats to the magnificent but unforgiving wilds of the Rockies. After a local hunter brings her back from the brink of death, she must find a way to live again. Drama, directed by and starring Robin Wright, with Demián Bichir and Sarah Dawn Pledge

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Vicky and Carl have always planned to move to Spain for their retirement, but now that their children are going to university theyve brought their plans forward deciding that now is the time to find the perfect holiday home on the southern Costa Blanca. With a budget of £70,000, Jean Johansson shows the couple some tempting options - are any of them good enough for them to put in an offer?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Liverpool, Phil Spencer helps James and his wife Mairead, who are new to the area and want a property on a budget of £600,000, while Kirstie Allsopp assists fledgling house-hunters Andy and Laura, and it soon becomes apparent the couple have quite different expectations about their first home together

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A local newscaster requests an interview with Sam, giving him a poignant reminder of how much he misses his former celebrity status. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and John Ratzenberg

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar-room regulars are excited at the prospect of meeting Coachs future son-in-law, Roy, until they realise he is a complete lout with no redeeming features. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam upsets Diane by making advances to one of her old college friends who is on the rebound from an unhappy love affair. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally babysits the twins, and does such a good job that Debra gives her even more responsibility around the house. However, Marie fears her granddaughter is being treated like a slave

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray worries Debras criticism will make the children think he is a fool, and hatches a plan to win back their respect

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray refuses to take Debra to an awards ceremony, tired of her constant lateness, while Frank and Robert get into their own heated debate about the importance of punctuality. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes a new position as a magazine art critic, prompting a jealous Frasier to respond by launching his own arts show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following the brokers at UK Sothebys International Realty. The super prime property market is booming and competition to court ultra-high-net-worth individuals with money to spend is fierce. This programme features a grade I listed terraced home for sale overlooking Regents Park Lake. Built in 1822 and designed by renowned Regency architect John Nash, its worth an eye-watering £29million, making it one of the most expensive homes in the UK. Also in London, managing director of UK Sothebys International Realty Guy is invited to sell a rather unusual houseboat boasting five bedrooms and three bathrooms

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues his battle to restore the failing Towns Inn in Harpers Ferry, West Virginia. After witnessing abysmal food hygiene practices in the restaurant, the chef is left in disbelief as he uncovers terrifying cleanliness issues throughout the hotel. Can he win over stubborn owner Karan Townsend and persuade her to turn things round?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Adventure reality series where contestants hunt each other through a forest, with one side winning if they can evade detection and the other seeking to capture them. In this opening episode, the players arrive at basecamp and meet for the very first time before being split into prey and predators. As the first hunt gets underway, an initial alliance is shattered by betrayal

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Jack Dee and GK Barry, and Jason Williamson from Sleaford Mods for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie makes a beehive piñata and a hot air balloon-inspired paper garland, perfect for a childrens party

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect tries to unlock the potential of old properties. He starts out in Stroud, where Phil and Leighla are transforming their ramshackle, listed Georgian farmhouse with an industrial-style extension. George also pays a visit to Wootton Bassett, where he helps a couple flip the layout of their Victorian end-of-terrace home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer helps a couple who are at loggerheads over their priorities for their next property, with Becki wanting a ready-to-move-into family home, while Craig is looking for a bargain project in the popular suburbs of south Manchester. Kirstie Allsopp meets newlyweds Chris and Amy in Cheshire, who are looking to buy their first home together and want something semi-rural in pricey areas including Knutsford, Lymm and Frodsham

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of three. Don the plumber asks Rebecca to marry him, while Sam sees Diane on a TV awards show and makes the decision to get back in touch with her

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of three. Woodys new post as a city counsellor enables him to help Norm get a new job, while an unexpected turn of events could lead to a reconciliation for Sam and Diane

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: One for the Road - Part Three
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, Sam and Diane are plagued by doubts about the idea of getting back together, while rest of the regulars gang ponder the meaning of life

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy invites her brother for dinner, but he ends up outstaying his welcome, forcing Robert to take desperate measures to eject him from the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra begin telling lies in a bid to cover up previous falsehoods, but Marie soon suspects what they are doing. Comedy, with Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes a dislike to KACLs newest presenter, sharp-tongued radio psychiatrist Dr Nora. Award-winning episode of the comedy series, guest starring Christine Baranski and Piper Laurie

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: When a Man Loves Two Women
programme.desc: Cassandra Stone, the woman Frasier dated on Valentines Day, agrees to go out with him again - but the appearance of his former girlfriend Faye, who has been out of the country for a while, complicates matters. Comedy, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Amy Brenneman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne agrees to marry Donny, but has a vision that suggests he is wrong for her, and tempts fate by turning to Niles for advice on how to proceed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Shut Out in Seattle - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Daphnes engagement to Donny leaves Niles feeling down, so he seeks solace in the arms of a younger woman. Frasier keeps getting his girlfriends name wrong, Martins relationship with Bonnie turns sour, and Roz cannot bring herself to break up with Bulldog

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help the owners of Grumpy George, an English pub located in Georgetown, Texas. The pub is owned by Karen and her husband Christian, who admit that they have little idea how to run a restaurant. Chef Michael has complete control of the kitchen and the menu, but his area of expertise is Puerto Rican food and he thinks that British cuisine is bland. As a result, the restaurant lacks a quintessential British identity and money is getting tighter by the day

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head to Worcestershire where Max transforms old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon makes a trendy bar bench out of old barrels

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Janice says an emotional goodbye to some of her beloved Hampshire Down sheep, and Matts plan to build a patio and seating area in front of the farmhouse begins to take shape. Meanwhile, with the body of the Dodge fully stripped, Matt and the restoration garage team face the challenge of separating it from its chassis, and Nicola accompanies Mike on a shopping trip in search of ingredients for a celebratory paella

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Bev and Errol are keen to find their very own Spanish holiday home near the Mar Menor. Theyve chosen the area because of its beautiful climate and great value for money. Jasmine Harman shows them some options for their maximum budget of £65,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Colin and Paul make progress with their Bulgarian barn conversion and Jo and Ken open their hotel doors to the flamboyance of flamenco in Spain. Mother-and-daughter duo Becky and Kay host their first yoga retreat and in France, Jon and Angela turn an old shed into a wedding venue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick hosts the weeks third visit at Impossible Motel in the centre of York, where he offers a range of quirky rooms including rock star suites complete with hot tubs and an eyebrow-raising dungeon room with a bed on chains

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Natalia hopes her Nineties-themed evening will be a cut above the rest as the West Country diners gather for the third time this week. However, her spicy twist on a prawn cocktail get Peppe all hot under the collar, while Jos no-nonsense nitpicking gets her into hot water with the hostess

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Danni Menzies revisits best friends Sarah and Jo on Corfu to find out if they are enjoying the fruits of their labour at their olive grove house. Leah Charles-King sees how Hannah and Gareth are getting on in Salobreña

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: The property expert charts the experiences of people who have bought homes at auction. In Guildford, she meets Alison and Michael, who were forced to sell their old home when the interest rate shot up. But will their auction buy, with its unanticipated pitfalls, give them the financial freedom theyre looking for? She also meets a couple tackling a creaky seven-bedroom BandB in Cornwall and visits an old council loo in Newport, south Wales, thats been transformed into a unique performance space by local resident Janet

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emmas new shop is flourishing - and so is romance with the handsome David. But love has let her down before, and she finds herself torn between following her heart and revenge on the Fairleys. Meanwhile, a newly sober Adele crashes back into Fairley Hall, jeopardising Adam and Olivias affair and Edwins upcoming marriage to Priya. In the 1970s, Emma commands her granddaughter Paula to break off her romance with Jim Fairley, forcing Paula to choose between her grandmother and her lover

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Analysis of never-before-seen letters from Ian Brady and Myra Hindley, written over their five decades in prison, and personal accounts from those who knew them. The first episode features an eyewitness account of the last murder from Myra Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith, and contributions from 1960s pop singer Janie Jones, who befriended Hindley in prison and conducted a 40-year-long correspondence with both Hindley and Brady

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Following the arrest of Brady for a single murder, police discover a tape recording of a 10-year-old girl being tortured and realise they are investigating a string of murders. Eyewitness Clive Entwistle describes the first police search of the moors above Manchester. He was present when the remains of the girl on the tape were found, and explains how police used photographs of the serial-killing couple posing on the moors to locate the body of the third known victim, a 12-year-old boy

programme.title: Moors Murders
programme.desc: Hindleys brother-in-law David Smith and journalist Clive Entwistle describe the killers trial in 1966, and recall the tension in court as they faced justice, including the moment when a tape recording of a girl being tortured was played. The film also documents Myra Hindleys life in prison, and her protracted, unsuccessful campaign to secure her parole

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotels restaurant and ice-cream parlour are failing. Gordon confronts owner Brents inappropriate and miserly behaviour, but is it enough to repair the establishments reputation?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The players discover who is the first to be culled. The group barely have time to recover from this shocking revelation before day two dawns and the hunt begins again. One friendship faces the ultimate test in the heat of the moment, while the breaking of a secret deal leads to a fiery clash back at base. With loyalties divided and trust called into question, the players with power must choose who to keep in the contest

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect helps more people make their period homes fit for modern life. George looks to Japan for inspiration as he helps Rachel and Sarah with the ground floor of their Victorian terraced home in Worthing. In Worcestershire, he meets a young couple who have bitten off more than they can chew in the shape of a listed 17th-century cottage

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey heads to Bradford to help a busy multigenerational household, who dream of creating a spacious kitchen diner where they can host extended family feasts. Instead, after encountering problems, they are cooking in a building site. Meanwhile, at Pickle Cottage in Essex, Stacey pushes herself to tackle a new DIY skill, applying her own micro-cement

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of first-time buyers searching for properties in south London. Niki and Rob have £450,000 and want a home with enough space to allow them to start a family, while Georgie and Louis have been commuting from Surrey for years and feel the time is right to move to the capital. But what will they find with a £220,000 budget?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers and her husband-to-be Sumner Sloan call in for a drink at a bar before setting off for their wedding. However, he decides to return to his ex-wife, so owner Sam Malone offers the jilted woman a job as a waitress. Starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam tries to find a more intelligent woman in a bid to impress Diane, who is scornful of the brainless bimbos he usually dates. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla attacks a customer for insulting the Boston Red Sox, ending with a lawsuit demanding either she be fired or Sam loses the bar. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amys parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her fathers drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The kids damage Rays dictionary, prompting Frank to tell everyone about the time Ray ruined his prized jazz collection. However, he discovers that he may not have been the culprit all along

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra helps to plan a recruitment party at Franks lodge, leading Ray to grumble about how much time she is spending away from home. Comedy, starring Patricia Hearten and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Shut Out in Seattle - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles and Roz take extreme action to solve dilemmas in their respective love lives. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Niles meet the new woman in Frasiers life - and discover to their surprise that she looks just like his mother. Comedy, guest starring Rita Wilson, alongside Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Frasier inadvertently offer to pay for Daphnes wedding, while Niles sinks into gloom as the marriage approaches and tries to console himself by dating someone new - unaware she is a prostitute. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The station shock-jocks decide to play practical jokes - and Frasiers pompous manner makes him the ideal target for their dubious humour. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Cedar Creek, a small, rural town in Texas, Gordon tries to help the owners of Leos Italian Grill rediscover their dream of a vibrant restaurant. After his son died, Leos passion faded, leading to poor food quality and service. Gordon sets out to re-ignite and partner Michelles love for the business and restore the restaurant to its former glory

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the north of Wales where they meet Sue, who is clearing out her late husbands antique shop stock. Henry manages to find a pedal car, while Simon takes a toy yacht

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: In summer, the sheep are sheared and Matt makes plans for a new home for the chickens that will give them access to free-range grazing. The family attempts the first honey harvest. It is movie night in the courtyard as the footage captured by the wildlife cameras in the woodlands is finally revealed. With the body of the Dodge lifted off its chassis, the engine at its heart has been revealed

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Nikki and Gordon to search for a holiday home on the Maltese island of Gozo for their budget of £350,000. Ben has five impressive properties up his sleeve; will any of them deliver the Mediterranean dream?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, hoteliers Jo and Ken try to bring in a profit with their musical side hustle. In Bulgaria, Colin faces a difficult decision, while in France, rain looks to threaten the success of for Jon and Angelas wedding

programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amys parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her fathers drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The kids damage Rays dictionary, prompting Frank to tell everyone about the time Ray ruined his prized jazz collection. However, he discovers that he may not have been the culprit all along

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra helps to plan a recruitment party at Franks lodge, leading Ray to grumble about how much time she is spending away from home. Comedy, starring Patricia Hearten and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally babysits the twins, and does such a good job that Debra gives her even more responsibility around the house. However, Marie fears her granddaughter is being treated like a slave

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray worries Debras criticism will make the children think he is a fool, and hatches a plan to win back their respect

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentines Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joeys spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joeys revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebes new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Phoebe believes the tea leaves foretell she is about to meet the man of her dreams, and Ross tries to recover his favourite pink shirt from former girlfriend Monas apartment. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. Meanwhile, Phoebes boyfriend drives the gang crazy with his boundless enthusiasm. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. Rachel persuades him to reconsider so that he can mention her, though Joey insists all his friends be present to ensure he does not say anything too controversial this time

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics at the thought of caring for her baby and reluctantly agrees to her mother moving in - much to Rosss annoyance. Chandler tries to help Joey prepare for his audition as a TV quiz show host by constantly playing a baffling game

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica have fun placing bets on when Rachels overdue baby will arrive, while Chandler accompanies Joey to the premiere of his new film - and promptly falls asleep

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachels labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Phoebe and Joey agree to find dates for each other and Rachels paediatrician drops her from his list of clients because she keeps pestering him about Emma

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebes Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebes birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachels decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebes love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Maverick (1994)
programme.desc: Wisecracking gambler Bret Maverick and con artist Annabelle Bransford cheat their way across the Wild West to make the money they need to enter a high-stakes, once-in-a-century poker tournament, with a ruthless rival on their trail and a principled lawman as an unlikely travelling companion. Comedy Western, starring Mel Gibson and Jodie Foster, with James Garner, star of the original TV series, alongside Graham Greene and James Coburn

programme.sub-title: Mohawks and Madness, Goodness and Gladness
programme.desc: The captain of the Seabrooke fights an agonising illness and the Northwestern takes revenge on the Time Bandit as the Bering Sea fleet finishes the season

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows they have been watching during the week. Programmes being appraised include Planet Earth III, Mamma Mia! I Have a Dream, Surviving Paradise, Uncanny, Celebrity Race Across the World and Crack Addicts. Plus, they share their thoughts on news coverage of the two recent by-elections and the death of Bobby Charlton

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea
programme.desc: Part one of two. Made in Chelsea veterans Binky Felstead, Lucy Watson and Rosie Fortescue navigate new challenges. Lucy and Rosies friendship turns frosty

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisas extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica attempts to fool Beverly into thinking a parents weekend has been rescheduled. Meanwhile, Adam joins the school production of Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Adam and Bianca reflect on their 2016 wedding when he chose to dodge every decision possible for fear of getting their big day wrong, and left everything in her hands

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson is up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision, and a sister is backed into a corner

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren decides who he wants, but he may be too late, and friends gather around to support Diane and Tony

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Parks Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorges in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duos suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving arrives at the Goldberg family home, Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverlys carefully made plans

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys try to throw Luke the birthday party of his dreams, but Camerons ill-fated efforts as Fizbo the clown result in a trip to AandE. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family

Since his father died he has made many changes to the organisation, and posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition to win a dream job, he works among his own staff to see if his dads legacy still lives on

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in north Somerset show off their culinary and hosting skills, Norman and Dee kick things off with an Indian menu that proves too spicy for their guests, followed by young lovebirds Ashley and Sophie - although Ashley lets the side down with an un-ironed shirt. Finally, self-styled funnyman Brett and his wife Vicky end the week with an American menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Artistic couple Zaya and Damian kick off the competition in Cornwall with an aspirational modern British menu. Next, property developers Kelly and Jon cook a simple menu in the brand new kitchen of their newly-refurbished massive Georgian mansion, which wows their guests. And Emma and Gavin host a Cornish evening of food and fun. However, it remains to be seen who will walk away with the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows they have been watching during the week. Programmes being appraised include Planet Earth III, Mamma Mia! I Have a Dream, Surviving Paradise, Uncanny, Celebrity Race Across the World and Crack Addicts. Plus, they share their thoughts on news coverage of the two recent by-elections and the death of Bobby Charlton

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea
programme.desc: Part one of two. Made in Chelsea veterans Binky Felstead, Lucy Watson and Rosie Fortescue navigate new challenges. Lucy and Rosies friendship turns frosty

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisas extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica attempts to fool Beverly into thinking a parents weekend has been rescheduled. Meanwhile, Adam joins the school production of Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Adam and Bianca reflect on their 2016 wedding when he chose to dodge every decision possible for fear of getting their big day wrong, and left everything in her hands

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson is up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision, and a sister is backed into a corner

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren decides who he wants, but he may be too late, and friends gather around to support Diane and Tony

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Parks Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorges in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duos suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving arrives at the Goldberg family home, Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverlys carefully made plans

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys try to throw Luke the birthday party of his dreams, but Camerons ill-fated efforts as Fizbo the clown result in a trip to AandE. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With the children behaving boisterously, Claire and Phil threaten to cancel their Christmas celebrations, and Lily is taken to see Santa. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Veteran actress Carol Cleveland, a former star of Monty Python, meets interior designer Keith. Could he be the leading man shes been waiting for all these years? Twenty-six-year-old Charles has never had a girlfriend and is yet to experience his first kiss. Could 22-year-old Freya be the one to change that? With a shared passion for origami, it isnt long before Charles impresses Freya with his talents

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makiss reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer accidentally declares himself bankrupt, while Bart and Lisa con a delivery man into giving them a large amount of cardboard boxes. Grampa leaves the Springfield Retirement Castle and ends up falling in love with Selma

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a member of the paparazzi, and proves so successful at snapping embarrassing photographs that his celebrity victims seek revenge on him for exposing their indiscretions

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Mannys hot-tempered basketball coach quits, causing Jay and Phil to compete for the position. Elsewhere, Mitchell introduces Cameron to a prospective employer. Comedy, starring Nolan Gould, Rico Rodriguez, Ed ONeill and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is suspicious when Grandpa Dunphy pays a surprise visit, while Cameron tries to find his inner drummer when he joins Dylans band. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria regret taking Manny to see a horror film. Comedy, guest starring Fred Willard

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: As the coach pulls into Portimao in Portugal, two famous faces hop aboard to join the fun. The celebs hang out with some furry friends as they try to master dog training

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisas extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Rex braves his first public outing while experimenting with his image at an LGBTQ+ club night, and at the Loft relaunch party, a shocking turn of events puts all eyes on Mercedes

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea
programme.desc: Part two of two. Tensions rise between Lucy and Rosie after Lucy hosts a recipe tasting for the soft launch of her new vegan cookbook, while trying to get house renovations sorted

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An omnibus edition of the two part-special for Stand Up to Cancer first shown in November 2023. Bob Mortimer and Richard Ayoade hit the sofa with Jennifer Saunders and Beattie Edmondson. And actors Stephen Graham and Hannah Walters tune in with their children Grace and Alfie. They watch The Great British Bake Off, Survivor, Planet Earth III, Made in Chelsea, No One Will Save You, Teen First Dates, and Harry and Elizabeths Stand Up To Cancer stories

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons meet up for a blind date, including former boarding school pupil Hugo, who is back for a second shot at love. Trainee opera singer Olympia takes centre stage for his encore performance - but will she hit all the right notes to win him over? Other hopefuls include ex-Playboy bunny Jacqui, who is paired up with ex-stripper Ricky, and sensitive soul Steven, who is hoping to find someone who will get along with the most important lady in his life - his nan. Will keen knitter Anna fit the bill?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is shes open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when theyre all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: Beyond Chelsea
programme.desc: Part two of two. Tensions rise between Lucy and Rosie after Lucy hosts a recipe tasting for the soft launch of her new vegan cookbook, while trying to get house renovations sorted

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to get hold of the years must-have gadget for Phils birthday. Cam gets involved in a neighbours marital problems, while Mitchell decides it is time to toughen up. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Ty Burrell, Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: A 100 Per Cent True Ghost Story
programme.desc: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry resolves to throw a Halloween party for the ages - no matter what Erica says. Beverly and Murray square off over whether or not their house is haunted

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. Meanwhile, Manny is set to direct Jays dog bed commercial in the hopes of winning his ex-girlfriend back. Return of the American comedy for what is reportedly its final season, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire needs to get everyone out of the house as she tries to impress a reporter from a womens business magazine, while Jay attempts to spend quality time with Manny

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoffrey is excited to join in, despite Ericas reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mannys biological father visits, and Jays reaction to him lands him in trouble with Gloria. Meanwhile, Claire relies on a fireman to get Phil to the hospital for kidney stone treatment and Lily is sleep-trained by her doting dads. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell manipulates Jay to make him think that an old friend might be gay when he notices several questionable signs. Meanwhile, Gloria gives Mannys date a makeover, and Claire wages war against Phils universal remote control. Guest starring Chazz Palminteri (Bullets Over Broadway)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twenty one-year-old post-grad student Madeleine struggles to find guys who stimulate her mentally, and would love to meet a rugby boy whos marriage material. Shes paired with rugby-playing Tom Hardy impersonator Ewan. Returning to the restaurant after a problem first date is truck driver Paul. His date is 50-year-old fellow Geordie Tracey. Meanwhile, 35-year-old Sophie from York seeks a man who isnt going to mess her around

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike and Nellies Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateurs two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brazilian football legend Ronaldo visits the town to advise Homer on refereeing Little League matches, while Marge reacts to accusations of technophobia by purchasing a PC - and soon becomes hooked on a game involving a virtual Springfield being terrorised by Bart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart receives a lot of negative attention from Springfield residents when he costs the Isotots baseball team the Little League championship. Lisa tries to cheer him up by introducing him to Bill Buckner, but her plan goes awry. Meanwhile, Homer becomes a mattress salesman, but finds his new role causes issues with Marge

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed ONeill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed ONeill

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach is parked up in Portimao in Portugal. A morning of fun at a water park ends dramatically for one tourist, so a more serene afternoon of lawn bowls follows

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party
programme.desc: Companion show hosted by Jules Lund, Brittany Hockney and Laura Byrne. Each week, a selection of the current series participants share behind-the-scenes gossip, betrayals and shocking revelations from the experiment. In the first episode, Alissa, Stella, Chris and Danny unpack unexpected pregnancy announcements

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Banged Up: Stars Behind Bars, Planet Earth, Culprits, The Curse of Robert the Doll and Little Trains and Big Names with Pete Waterman. From November 2023

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: After being stood up the previous week, Geordie model Georgia ended up flirting with nice guy Alex. Now they are back to pick up where they left off. Baker Chloe prides herself on being a good judge of character, which is just as well because her date, amateur dramatics enthusiast Ben, has played many different roles in his time. Swinging sixties fan Robert is hoping fifties fashionista Amy will accompany him to a Northern Soul night after their meal - although he might have second thoughts when he sees whats tattooed on her toe. Plus, the subject of family life proves to be high on the agenda for make-up artist Verona and fire-fighter Paul, as well as father-of-one Patrick and German-born Thomas

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.desc: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love having the twins around, but find taking care of them is exhausting. However, when they realise the babies might help them with a few things on their to-do lists, they offer to give Haley the day off

programme.desc: Part two of two. Tensions rise between Lucy and Rosie after Lucy hosts a recipe tasting for the soft launch of her new vegan cookbook, while trying to get house renovations sorted

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An omnibus edition of the two part-special for Stand Up to Cancer first shown in November 2023. Bob Mortimer and Richard Ayoade hit the sofa with Jennifer Saunders and Beattie Edmondson. And actors Stephen Graham and Hannah Walters tune in with their children Grace and Alfie. They watch The Great British Bake Off, Survivor, Planet Earth III, Made in Chelsea, No One Will Save You, Teen First Dates, and Harry and Elizabeths Stand Up To Cancer stories

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to get hold of the years must-have gadget for Phils birthday. Cam gets involved in a neighbours marital problems, while Mitchell decides it is time to toughen up. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Ty Burrell, Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: A 100 Per Cent True Ghost Story
programme.desc: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry resolves to throw a Halloween party for the ages - no matter what Erica says. Beverly and Murray square off over whether or not their house is haunted

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find they are fakes and they cannot get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan as himself

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. Meanwhile, Manny is set to direct Jays dog bed commercial in the hopes of winning his ex-girlfriend back. Return of the American comedy for what is reportedly its final season, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire needs to get everyone out of the house as she tries to impress a reporter from a womens business magazine, while Jay attempts to spend quality time with Manny
