Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makiss reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When a publisher shows interest in her recipes, Beverly prepares to finally realise her dream of writing a cookbook. Meanwhile, Geoff finds himself caught between Erica and Barry

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoffrey is excited to join in, despite Ericas reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mannys biological father visits, and Jays reaction to him lands him in trouble with Gloria. Meanwhile, Claire relies on a fireman to get Phil to the hospital for kidney stone treatment and Lily is sleep-trained by her doting dads. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell manipulates Jay to make him think that an old friend might be gay when he notices several questionable signs. Meanwhile, Gloria gives Mannys date a makeover, and Claire wages war against Phils universal remote control. Guest starring Chazz Palminteri (Bullets Over Broadway)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.desc: Twenty one-year-old post-grad student Madeleine struggles to find guys who stimulate her mentally, and would love to meet a rugby boy whos marriage material. Shes paired with rugby-playing Tom Hardy impersonator Ewan. Returning to the restaurant after a problem first date is truck driver Paul. His date is 50-year-old fellow Geordie Tracey. Meanwhile, 35-year-old Sophie from York seeks a man who isnt going to mess her around

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike and Nellies Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart receives a lot of negative attention from Springfield residents when he costs the Isotots baseball team the Little League championship. Lisa tries to cheer him up by introducing him to Bill Buckner, but her plan goes awry. Meanwhile, Homer becomes a mattress salesman, but finds his new role causes issues with Marge

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed ONeill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed ONeill

programme.title: The Simpsons

Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party

Baker Chloe prides herself on being a good judge of character, which is just as well because her date, amateur dramatics enthusiast Ben, has played many different roles in his time. Swinging sixties fan Robert is hoping fifties fashionista Amy will accompany him to a Northern Soul night after their meal - although he might have second thoughts when he sees whats tattooed on her toe. Plus, the subject of family life proves to be high on the agenda for make-up artist Verona and fire-fighter Paul, as well as father-of-one Patrick and German-born Thomas

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, making quick Asian fishcakes with a brilliant tip for a sweet and spicy glaze. He also prepares a speedy lemony courgette linguine, sticky lamb chops as a single-pan dish, and cherry chocolate mousse for dessert

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, making a tender lamb shoulder for a sharing feast that is super-quick to prepare, as well as green spaghetti, a one-pan fish dish and apple crumble cookies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what some chefs cook when they get home after work, with quick and easy recipes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks with Grand Pellegrino for the famous Raos restaurant, and finds out the best kitchens in America

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining contestants face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by creating 12 perfect rye bread rolls shaped in any way they like and using as much flour as they dare. For the technical challenge they have to prepare Italian ciabatta using Pauls recipe, before ending with show-stopping centrepiece loaves that will have to make an impact on the table as well as on the judges. Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry then decide which of the contenders will be the weeks star baker - and which of them is going home. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants dessert-making skills, beginning with a signature challenge of a sponge containing a gooey sauce filling or a saucy surprise at the bottom. The technical round involves creating a tiramisu cake, before the contenders have to prepare a baked Alaska for the showstopper. Plus, presenter Sue Perkins explores the origins of Paignton pudding, a heavyweight version of which caused a riot in the Devon town in 1859

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the riverside town of LIsle-sur-la-Sorgue in south-eastern France, where his culinary hero Keith Floyd once owned a restaurant. Buying produce from its floating market, and a Floyd-style hat, James sets up his mobile kitchen on a bridge overlooking the river, and cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. Heading back in the direction of the town, James samples some truffle-laden dishes at renowned restaurant La Beaugraviere

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Normandy and sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many calvados orchards in the area, making a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. He also visits restaurant Le Pave dAuge in Beuvron-en-Auge to meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does

programme.desc: The tour of Yorkshire continues in Leeds, as Simon King and Dave Myers visit the stunning Kirkgate market before riding to Skipton. programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food

programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases a range of cheeses and the best ways to prepare them

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina and Jeffrey start the day with a fabulous breakfast, before heading off to Brooklyn for a culinary tour armed with a packed lunch, including a visit to a pizza place

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After last weeks baked Alaska scandal - which led to Iain hanging up his apron and has since also seen Diana leave the show - judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants pastry skills. They begin with a signature challenge of a sweet custard tart of their own invention, ranging from rhubarb and custard to tropical Manchester tart. The technical round involves recreating Pauls recipe for mini pear pies, followed by their showpiece bake - a towering collection of three-tiered pies in just four hours. Along the way, Mel Giedroyc investigates the history of an ancient wedding centrepiece known as Bride Pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six bakers have passed the halfway point of the contest, and now face three European bakes - beginning with yeast-leavened cakes, a tricky cross between cake and bread. Mary Berry then sets them the challenge of rustling up a Swedish princess torte, but they have their work cut out completing all 24 stages of the recipe in little more than two hours. They finish by creating their own version of the dobos torte, a multi-layered cake from Hungary. However, they must go one step further and bake a two-tiered version with an emphasis on caramel. Which of the bakers will come to a sticky end?

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of Claude Monet in Giverny, where he prepares a dish of crab and dulse, and samples pike as served by local chef Eric Guerin

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef visits the capital city, Paris, exploring one of the largest wholesale food markets in Europe, before setting up a cooking station in one of the warehouses to cook a dish using chicken and mushrooms. James also visits the kitchen of the world-renowned chef, Pierre Gagnaire

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson in Northumberland, where the pair learn how mead is made on Holy Island. James cooks up a Singapore-inspired crab and lobster dish on a stunning beach, before he and Kenny enjoy a cruise around Coquet Island, which is an RSPB reserve

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen on a visit to the Isle of Man during the warm-up week for the famous TT race. James serves up proper biker food - pork burgers with a spicy apple sauce - and picks up some local Manx kippers to make soup. programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, making a tender lamb shoulder for a sharing feast that is super-quick to prepare, as well as green spaghetti, a one-pan fish dish and apple crumble cookies.

programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what some chefs cook when they get home after work, with quick and easy recipes

programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks with Grand Pellegrino for the famous Raos restaurant, and finds out the best kitchens in America

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining contestants face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by creating 12 perfect rye bread rolls shaped in any way they like and using as much flour as they dare. For the technical challenge they have to prepare Italian ciabatta using Pauls recipe, before ending with show-stopping centrepiece loaves that will have to make an impact on the table as well as on the judges. Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry then decide which of the contenders will be the weeks star baker - and which of them is going home. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants dessert-making skills, beginning with a signature challenge of a sponge containing a gooey sauce filling or a saucy surprise at the bottom. The technical round involves creating a tiramisu cake, before the contenders have to prepare a baked Alaska for the showstopper. Plus, presenter Sue Perkins explores the origins of Paignton pudding, a heavyweight version of which caused a riot in the Devon town in 1859

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the riverside town of LIsle-sur-la-Sorgue in south-eastern France, where his culinary hero Keith Floyd once owned a restaurant. Buying produce from its floating market, and a Floyd-style hat, James sets up his mobile kitchen on a bridge overlooking the river, and cooks peaches pain perdu in the sunshine. Heading back in the direction of the town, James samples some truffle-laden dishes at renowned restaurant La Beaugraviere

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Normandy and sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many calvados orchards in the area, making a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. He also visits restaurant Le Pave dAuge in Beuvron-en-Auge to meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After last weeks baked Alaska scandal - which led to Iain hanging up his apron and has since also seen Diana leave the show - judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants pastry skills. They begin with a signature challenge of a sweet custard tart of their own invention, ranging from rhubarb and custard to tropical Manchester tart. The technical round involves recreating Pauls recipe for mini pear pies, followed by their showpiece bake - a towering collection of three-tiered pies in just four hours. Along the way, Mel Giedroyc investigates the history of an ancient wedding centrepiece known as Bride Pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six bakers have passed the halfway point of the contest, and now face three European bakes - beginning with yeast-leavened cakes, a tricky cross between cake and bread. Mary Berry then sets them the challenge of rustling up a Swedish princess torte, but they have their work cut out completing all 24 stages of the recipe in little more than two hours. They finish by creating their own version of the dobos torte, a multi-layered cake from Hungary. However, they must go one step further and bake a two-tiered version with an emphasis on caramel. Which of the bakers will come to a sticky end?

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of Claude Monet in Giverny, where he prepares a dish of crab and dulse, and samples pike as served by local chef Eric Guerin

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef visits the capital city, Paris, exploring one of the largest wholesale food markets in Europe, before setting up a cooking station in one of the warehouses to cook a dish using chicken and mushrooms. programme.desc: When Nellie dares Laura to enter a rickety old house, Laura discovers mysterious hermit Amos Pike living there. Laura then must help him overcome his denial and sorrow, when she tells him that his wife is dead

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge drone and aerial photography to reveal Britains country houses and palaces from a new perspective, capturing breathtaking architecture, formal gardens and sweeping parklands in extraordinary detail. Beginning with Blenheim Palace in Oxfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Kevin, 57, arrives at Kings College Hospital in London with breathing difficulties, having fallen off a ladder onto a metal bar, while 11-year-old Archie has cut his lip in an accident at school and is worried about stitches. Elsewhere, a drink-related fall has left 53-year-old John with a head injury, and barman Ross, 31, needs treatment for a fractured eye socket following an alcohol-fuelled night out

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Actor Damon from Swindon takes his guests on a Segway tour of Barcelona, visiting the citys architectural hotspots. But his day is in danger of being a washout

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves north to Blackpool and the three-star Vidella BandB run by John Downer and Neil Williams. The pair rig Blackpool-hater Alistair Mundells room with practical jokes, and take their guests to Funny Girls drag cabaret bar, where Mark Crib confesses he has never had such a surreal time

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Cockermouth, Cumbria, Simon OBrien and Henry Cole meet blacksmith Jon, who spent many years working on fairgrounds. At the valuation, independent valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan reckons theres rich pickings to be made from railway memorabilia

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lorna and Gordon are relocating and looking for their new dream home around the seaside town of Benalmádena on Spains Costa del Sol. For their budget of £250,000, they want enough space for their family of 19 children and grandchildren to come and visit. Ben Hillman shows them five great options, but will any measure up to the couples idea of perfection?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Hastings and Rye in East Sussex, where the first host is 52-year-old nursery owner Louise, who plans a fun-filled evening of Thai food. Her guests are horse-mad Emily, whos 40, 56-year-old Caribbean takeaway owner Clive, 23-year-old beauty therapist Chiara and mature student and self-confessed foodie Gary. A power cut threatens to scupper Louises night before its even started, until her husband - and farmer - Roddy and his generator come to the rescue. Will the night impress the guests, and particularly the self-appointed Thai food expert at the table?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second night from Hastings and Rye in East Sussex sees host Emily plan an evening of comfort food, including carrot and parsnip soup, meat loaf and apple and blackberry crumble

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian mature student Gary hosts the third dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning an evening filled with fun, flash and fabulous flavour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dec, a former member of 1960s band the Bachelors, hosts the next dinner party from Hastings and Rye, planning to impress his guests with musical surprises and a simple seaside menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, beauty therapist Chiara returns to her roots to throw an Italian dinner party. However, Irish crooner Dec gets on his hosts wrong side when he questions her interest in healing crystals and likens her to a page three glamour girl

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Lazy Pug in Warwickshire. Friends Ash and Rosie are hoping to win over their guests with quirky rooms and a healthy dose of neon lights

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to the Crofts Hotel in Cardiff, run by chef Lorraine. However, the guests are uninspired by the bland decoration and feel that everything is a bit basic

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals spend the night at the Hollybush Inn in Priors Marston, Warwickshire, where owner Anthony hopes to wow his guests with the 16th-century coaching inns history

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners arrive at The Pretty Thing glampsite in St Osyth, Essex, run by Phil. Theres a melee of mixed emotions when the guests arrive, with Lorraine and Anthony left feeling cold by the communal showers, while Ash and Rosie embrace all the impressive luxury their Aztec tent has to offer. Over drinks, Phil lets slip that the breakfast service the following morning will be his first ever

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition, and the BandBers reconvene to feud about facilities, bicker over beds and cross swords over sausages, before the payments are revealed and the winner announced. Garish neon lights, dogs at breakfast and cleanliness issues are on the agenda as the hoteliers get heated while discussing a colourful week

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw enter the weird and wonderful world of the Bond Bug - a wedge-shaped three-wheel car from the early 1970s. The car belongs to 69-year-old Ian, whose dreams of joining the Bond Bug owners club and taking part in rallies and car shows were cruelly thwarted when he developed Parkinsons disease. Tim and Fuzz step in to get his quirky motor up and running while he is still able to enjoy it

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, to pick up a 1988 Fiat Uno Turbo, one of the fastest hatchbacks of its time. The car belongs to car salesman Gerry, a dyed-in-the-wool boy racer. Sadly, Gerrys ill health has meant that the Uno has been tucked away and left to rot on his drive. His friends and family hope the boys treatment can bring some joy back into Gerrys life

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps a couple looking for a home in Warrington, who do not seem to be able to agree on the best approach to house hunting, which has led to six months with no progress. In Liverpool, Phil Spencer comes to the aid of a successful entrepreneur looking for a house in Crosby, but who has very specific ideas

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to the village of Clifford, West Yorkshire, to meet Vic and Paul Miller, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Vic feels that the pair should look for a new home more suitable for them and their two young twins, but Paul believes they could use the budget to transform the propertys layout and create a more functional family space

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Holistic therapist Kara and electrician Jonny are building a striking stone and zinc four-bedroom family home in the rolling hills of West Yorkshire, for themselves and their two young children. The need to build has been motivated by Karas recent paralysis, caused by a rare autoimmune condition. Their ambition for the house is enormous, as Kara wants to create a home that is not only beautiful but will help her regain some independence. With money tight, Jonny needs to take on a lot of the work himself. As the build progresses, and despite the challenges coming thick and fast, compromise is not an option with both form and function so essential. Building their single storey pushes both Kara and Jonny to the edge of their emotional and physical reserves, but if they can pull it off, it might just redefine what accessible design means

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors run tests on 89-year-old Alyce, who has been brought to Kings by ambulance after falling near her home. Shes accompanied by her close friend Linda, and reveals her resolve to make sure she lives long enough to celebrate her next birthday. Soon after, 23-year-old groom-to-be Sean is examined following an epileptic seizure lasting most of the night

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Among those arriving at Kings College Hospital is 56-year-old Malcolm, who is put on life support after a cardiac arrest. Nightclub host Phil, 36, receives treatment for chronic pain in his back and side, and realises his party lifestyle is taking its toll, while medics discover 61-year-old Bob has suffered a stroke. Doctors also see to Kamilla, 12, who has been knocked down by a car on a pedestrian crossing

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On the night shift, paramedics are called to a man complaining of a fast heart rate and chest pains. In the back of the ambulance, he claims to have taken amphetamines for several days. When a man is found slumped over a table outside a shop, the owners ring 999. The patient is intoxicated, and the all-female crew must be wary of his tight grip as they treat him in the back of the ambulance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.desc: Tara takes the gang clubbing in one of Barcelonas top nightclubs. Her 24 hours in charge pushes some of the group out of their comfort zone, but will her idea of holiday heaven be someones holiday hell?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Crib welcomes the group to the Urban Beach in Bournemouth, Dorset, for the weeks final BandB visit. The boutique establishment features chic rooms with deluxe bathrooms, and the guests approve of the afternoons activity - a speedboat ride along the Jurassic coast

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien continue their mission to repurpose old cast-offs into cash, making an extraordinary find from a Dutch designer in accountant Debbies lean-to

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Spain with their beloved dog Poppy. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Windsor, Berkshire, the first to host is estate agent Vikki whos hoping to bag the £1000 prize by hosting a ladies day-themed dinner party. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night in Windsor, and radio DJ Mary hosts an evening featuring traditional Irish dishes like vegetable soup, steak with champ, and an Eton Mess with a twist

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Windsor is outspoken entrepreneur Mohinder, who hopes to impress his fellow guests with an ambitious menu featuring tulips and a cauliflower foam

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, to rescue a 1992 VW Corrado, a German coupe that, in its time, was one of the fastest small family cars on the road. The car belongs to 37-year-old Ashley, who even went as far as changing his surname to match his car. Sadly, when Ashley fell ill, his car ended up rotting away under a cover

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Rochdale to rescue an Opel Manta GTE. The car belongs to former amateur rally driver Alan, who loved his Manta so much he couldnt bear to part with it, even when it went off the road. With Alan becoming a bit of a recluse after developing health problems and losing his wife to cancer, his family and friends hope that the Car S.O.S treatment will be just the thing to bring Alan back out of his shell

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help house-hunters find their dream properties in the Peak District, guiding them through the complex world of viewings and agents. Kirstie is with single mother Anne, who sold her home in Sheffield to move to the countryside with her teenage son. However, a short-term stay with her parents has turned into eight months, so Kirstie has her work cut out to find Anne a suitable property fast. Phil is with Andrea and James, who are still searching for their ideal place after two years

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lauren and Christian Grant in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Christian dreams of a home bursting with character, but Lauren thinks that they can refurbish their four-bedroom detached property to make it more suitable for them and their two small children

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Murder of Rikki Neave - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part special exploring the largest ever unsolved murder case in the history of Cambridgeshire Police, the murder of a six-year-old child in 1994. Initial investigations pointed to the boys mother, who seemed to have an interest in murder and black magic. When a new team takes over, they uncover flaws in the original police work and a compelling new lead

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Murder of Rikki Neave - Part Two
programme.desc: Concluding the investigation into the 1994 murder of six-year-old Rikki Neave. Fifteen years after Rikkis mother was cleared of his murder following a flawed police investigation, a team of dedicated officers from the Major Crime Unit of Cambridgeshire police were authorised to begin a fresh investigation. Analysis of the evidence put a new suspect, James Watson, who was 13 at the time of the killing, together with Rikki on the day of his disappearance. But despite a forensic breakthrough, Watson presented the officers with a conundrum that made it difficult to prove the case against him

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a man under arrest. Hes outside in the street and has hit his head, and the police want to make sure hes well enough to be taken to the station. A mum calls 999 when her six-year-old son has a seizure, and a nurse finds her patient in bed with a fever and having difficulty breathing. The paramedics suspect that he may have fractured a rib

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.sub-title: The Older You Get, the More Serious it Can Be
programme.desc: This compilation episode takes a look at some of the injuries that the UKs elderly population have suffered from, such as a man whos fallen while collecting his morning paper and has badly hit his head. Paramedics also treat a man who has collapsed at home with dangerously high blood sugar levels, as well as a woman whos fallen over while out shopping and may have broken her leg

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Kings College Hospital when police suspect a patient is concealing a weapon, while maybe mother-of-four Hillary arrives in resus with a severe head injury after falling from her horse. Icylyns bloated abdomen baffles the medical team and she has to wait overnight for a diagnosis, and 14-year-old Chloe receives treatment following her involvement in a fight

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sister Jen is on duty in resus looking after 48-year-old Bobby, who has been suffering from seizures at home. Bobby has spent most of his adult life in prison for a number of violent crimes including murder. Meanwhile, 70-year-old Ronald had to cut short his 46th wedding anniversary celebrations after experiencing breathing difficulties, and Rienelle, seven, receives treatment after falling from the top of a climbing frame at school

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: London-based teacher Angela takes the group out of the city to a vineyard to learn about the history and taste the local wine, but some members of the group take it too far. She blows the budget on a luxury boutique hotel in the hills but since the wine has been flowing all day long, the conversation is a little worse for wear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Brigitte Tee is upset to discover she has been given only one point for cleanliness and a heated exchange results in a walk-out, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge drone and aerial photography to reveal Britains country houses and palaces from a new perspective, capturing breathtaking architecture, formal gardens and sweeping parklands in extraordinary detail. Beginning with Blenheim Palace in Oxfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Kevin, 57, arrives at Kings College Hospital in London with breathing difficulties, having fallen off a ladder onto a metal bar, while 11-year-old Archie has cut his lip in an accident at school and is worried about stitches. Elsewhere, a drink-related fall has left 53-year-old John with a head injury, and barman Ross, 31, needs treatment for a fractured eye socket following an alcohol-fuelled night out

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old mechanical engineer Graham is rushed into Kings College Hospital in south London with a suspected heart attack, and after his brother reminisces about their carefree youth, the doctor suggests Grahams problems may be related to his more recent stressful lifestyle. Meanwhile, 71-year-old Pat is found unconscious by her husband, and 65-year-old Mick is discovered lying in the street with blood coming out of his ear. In both cases, the medics suspect brain haemorrhages, so scans are required

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Actor Damon from Swindon takes his guests on a Segway tour of Barcelona, visiting the citys architectural hotspots. But his day is in danger of being a washout

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves north to Blackpool and the three-star Vidella BandB run by John Downer and Neil Williams. The pair rig Blackpool-hater Alistair Mundells room with practical jokes, and take their guests to Funny Girls drag cabaret bar, where Mark Crib confesses he has never had such a surreal time

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Cockermouth, Cumbria, Simon OBrien and Henry Cole meet blacksmith Jon, who spent many years working on fairgrounds. At the valuation, independent valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan reckons theres rich pickings to be made from railway memorabilia

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lorna and Gordon are relocating and looking for their new dream home around the seaside town of Benalmádena on Spains Costa del Sol. For their budget of £250,000, they want enough space for their family of 19 children and grandchildren to come and visit. Ben Hillman shows them five great options, but will any measure up to the couples idea of perfection?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Hastings and Rye in East Sussex, where the first host is 52-year-old nursery owner Louise, who plans a fun-filled evening of Thai food. Her guests are horse-mad Emily, whos 40, 56-year-old Caribbean takeaway owner Clive, 23-year-old beauty therapist Chiara and mature student and self-confessed foodie Gary. A power cut threatens to scupper Louises night before its even started, until her husband - and farmer - Roddy and his generator come to the rescue. Will the night impress the guests, and particularly the self-appointed Thai food expert at the table?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second night from Hastings and Rye in East Sussex sees host Emily plan an evening of comfort food, including carrot and parsnip soup, meat loaf and apple and blackberry crumble

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian mature student Gary hosts the third dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning an evening filled with fun, flash and fabulous flavour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dec, a former member of 1960s band the Bachelors, hosts the next dinner party from Hastings and Rye, planning to impress his guests with musical surprises and a simple seaside menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, beauty therapist Chiara returns to her roots to throw an Italian dinner party. However, Irish crooner Dec gets on his hosts wrong side when he questions her interest in healing crystals and likens her to a page three glamour girl

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Lazy Pug in Warwickshire. Friends Ash and Rosie are hoping to win over their guests with quirky rooms and a healthy dose of neon lights

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to the Crofts Hotel in Cardiff, run by chef Lorraine. However, the guests are uninspired by the bland decoration and feel that everything is a bit basic

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals spend the night at the Hollybush Inn in Priors Marston, Warwickshire, where owner Anthony hopes to wow his guests with the 16th-century coaching inns history

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners arrive at The Pretty Thing glampsite in St Osyth, Essex, run by Phil. Theres a melee of mixed emotions when the guests arrive, with Lorraine and Anthony left feeling cold by the communal showers, while Ash and Rosie embrace all the impressive luxury their Aztec tent has to offer. Over drinks, Phil lets slip that the breakfast service the following morning will be his first ever

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition, and the BandBers reconvene to feud about facilities, bicker over beds and cross swords over sausages, before the payments are revealed and the winner announced. Garish neon lights, dogs at breakfast and cleanliness issues are on the agenda as the hoteliers get heated while discussing a colourful week

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw enter the weird and wonderful world of the Bond Bug - a wedge-shaped three-wheel car from the early 1970s. The car belongs to 69-year-old Ian, whose dreams of joining the Bond Bug owners club and taking part in rallies and car shows were cruelly thwarted when he developed Parkinsons disease. Tim and Fuzz step in to get his quirky motor up and running while he is still able to enjoy it

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, to pick up a 1988 Fiat Uno Turbo, one of the fastest hatchbacks of its time. The car belongs to car salesman Gerry, a dyed-in-the-wool boy racer. Sadly, Gerrys ill health has meant that the Uno has been tucked away and left to rot on his drive. His friends and family hope the boys treatment can bring some joy back into Gerrys life

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps a couple looking for a home in Warrington, who do not seem to be able to agree on the best approach to house hunting, which has led to six months with no progress. In Liverpool, Phil Spencer comes to the aid of a successful entrepreneur looking for a house in Crosby, but who has very specific ideas

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to the village of Clifford, West Yorkshire, to meet Vic and Paul Miller, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Vic feels that the pair should look for a new home more suitable for them and their two young twins, but Paul believes they could use the budget to transform the propertys layout and create a more functional family space

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Holistic therapist Kara and electrician Jonny are building a striking stone and zinc four-bedroom family home in the rolling hills of West Yorkshire, for themselves and their two young children. The need to build has been motivated by Karas recent paralysis, caused by a rare autoimmune condition. Their ambition for the house is enormous, as Kara wants to create a home that is not only beautiful but will help her regain some independence. With money tight, Jonny needs to take on a lot of the work himself. As the build progresses, and despite the challenges coming thick and fast, compromise is not an option with both form and function so essential. Building their single storey pushes both Kara and Jonny to the edge of their emotional and physical reserves, but if they can pull it off, it might just redefine what accessible design means

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors run tests on 89-year-old Alyce, who has been brought to Kings by ambulance after falling near her home. Shes accompanied by her close friend Linda, and reveals her resolve to make sure she lives long enough to celebrate her next birthday. Soon after, 23-year-old groom-to-be Sean is examined following an epileptic seizure lasting most of the night

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

Yasika Fernandos search for her Sri Lankan birth mother was watched by someone else born in the very same week and adopted from the very same convent, while Paula Stillie finally heads out to Montana to see her Native American aunts and uncles in person

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Medical doctors, science broadcasters and identical twins Chris and Xand van Tulleken team up to research their family tree. They grew up surrounded by old paintings and documents commemorating characters from their Dutch ancestry, but despite this wealth of family archive, the twins know little about their heritage. Their journey takes them back to the Netherlands, where they look into the career of sea captain Jan Tulleken, their four-times great-grandfather, a staunch royalist who joined the Dutch navy at 13. But as they trace the story back, they reveal a troubling story

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor Nigel Havers delves into his family history, and soon discovers his ancestors are very different to the upper-class characters for which he is known. He begins by following his mothers line, an investigation that takes him to rural Cornwall, where he uncovers a story of illegitimacy worthy of a period drama. Moving to his fathers side, Nigel finds himself in Colchester for the tale of the Victorian equivalent of an Essex cab driver made good, but which has an unhappy ending

programme.desc: Though Liz excels as a Medusan ship captain, her attitude toward men causes concern. Octavia orders tests to learn why Liz isnt attracted to Medusan men.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken steps in to investigate when an amnesiac turns up with a great deal of money and no idea where it came from. Stephen Rea guest stars.

programme.title: Rewind Time Machine
programme.desc: A look back at the pressing issue of cider production in Ilminster in 1982, and a hovercraft trip to get some Beaujolais Nouveau wine in France

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: During an attempt to return to Earth, members of the team accidentally transport themselves to 14th-century Scotland. Sci-fi adventure, with Martin Landau and Isla Blair

programme.title: Wolf Hall
programme.desc: Return of the historical drama, adapting the final novel in Hilary Mantels trilogy about Henry VIIIs adviser Thomas Cromwell. As Anne Boleyns blood is sluiced from the scaffold, Cromwell picks his way through the wreckage of her death to take his place as principal councillor to King Henry VIII. But in rising so high, Cromwell has also attracted powerful enemies. Mark Rylance and Damian Lewis reprise their roles alongside Harriet Walter and Timonthy Spall

programme.title: Agatha Christies Murder Is Easy

programme.title: RTÉ News: Six One and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Presenter Colm Flynn meets a Cork man who has been promoting and supporting Irish Country singers at home and around the world

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Penny tells Vinny he doesnt need to buy her expensive gifts in return for her love, but she is shocked when Vinny reveals he has put a deposit down on a shop in Turpin Road for her. The Slaters put on a show of family unity, and Bea lies that she was attacked to garner sympathy

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva Pau cooks a Chinese baked pork chop rice, a nostalgic, hearty dish layered with pork, fluffy rice, and a rich sauce. Next, she brings a twist to a classic with beef massaman curry pie, combining deep, warming curry flavours with flaky pastry. The chef also prepares Chinese chicken noodle soup

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire visits Glenarm Castle in Ballymena where he wanders around the gardens with estate manager Adrian Morrow, and also sees their famous shorthorn beef cows. He also takes a trip to Morellis ice cream shop in Portrush, where he samples some of their award winning flavours. Nevens own recipe is vanilla and hazelnut no-churn ice cream with poached pears and chocolate sauce

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Blue Lights
programme.desc: Drama following three new recruits to Belfasts police force. The arrest of young drug dealer Sandy McKnight begins to expose a criminal conspiracy involving every level of Belfasts society, from wealthy businesswoman Dana Morgan to vulnerable teenager Lindsay Singleton.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Architect Hugh Wallace helps Roscommon couple Mary Morris and Colm Dowd are creating their first home together - the Old Bank in Elphin. The residence is a neglected space that has allowed damp and mould to thrive. However, Mary and Colm have a vision that lets them see past all the moisture, allowing them to turn this behemoth of a building into not only into their home, but also their sanctuary

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Cyril faces his toughest challenge yet when he must make the difficult decision of whether two children abandoned in the local church will be taken into foster care or returned to their heavily pregnant mother. Matthews financial woes come to a head when he is summoned to a board meeting with his mother about the state of the business. As the summer draws to a close, the pupil midwives are coming to the end of their training and prepare to sit their final exams

programme.title: DJ Carey: The Dodger
programme.desc: The concluding part of the documentary reveals how, at the pinnacle of his fame, Careys marriage came to an end and the media pursued him relentlessly. When he met business magnate Sarah Newman, a new life in the exclusive K Club beckoned - but soon, questions about his health and finances became unavoidable, forcing him to face the music

programme.title: Camogie: Inside the Championship
programme.desc: Part two of two. Following the All Ireland Camogie Championship from start to finish, combining multiple teams and stories, witnessing heartbreak and triumph, culminating in a winner-takes-all climax at Croker

programme.title: Unwrapped: The Toy Show Appeal
programme.desc: A celebration of the joy, magic and real-life impact of The Late Late Toy Show Appeal on children and families across Ireland

programme.title: High Road, Low Road
programme.desc: Dancing with the Stars judge Karen Byrne and presenter James Patrice are in Klaipeda, Lithuania, for dunes, canoes, and a laugh or two. One of them enjoys a first-class luxury experience, while the other braves a budget trip

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie Molloy and building engineer Kieran McCarthy help 28-year-old health care worker Claire Hassett search for an affordable home. With a maximum budget of 170,000 euros, she is looking for a two or three-bedroom house that doesnt need a major refurbishment. Claire is hoping for a home that close to her job in Cork and family in Thurles

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: Francis and John Brennan help Alan and Grace Skehan, who own a busy holiday resort Dunmore East, Co Waterford, with a large mobile home park, self-catering houses, a nine-hole golf course and a restaurant and bar. Despite their workload Alan and Grace think big and want the Brennans advice about their ambitious plan to build luxury lodges and to extend the resort further

programme.title: Kayak o Thuaidh
programme.desc: Tessa Fleming and Irial Ó Ceallaigh set off from the historic Fort Dunree for the third leg of their journey. The physical and mental strain of this immense challenge is beginning to show, and a brief respite is needed before they make their way to the remote, abandoned island of Inishtrahull. After this experience of a lifetime, its back to the water and a paddle to the stunning Kinnegoe Bay and the cliffs of Inishowen Head, before crossing Lough Foyle into Co Derry, where they visit the ruins of Saint Aidans church at Magilligan. programme.title: Reeling in the Years
programme.desc: News and music from 1970, the year Brazil clinched the football World Cup, Dana won the Eurovision Song Contest and the Apollo 13 astronauts survived near-disaster. The Beatles split up after more than a decade together and Dublin enjoyed a thriving nightclub scene

After this experience of a lifetime, its back to the water and a paddle to the stunning Kinnegoe Bay and the cliffs of Inishowen Head, before crossing Lough Foyle into Co Derry, where they visit the ruins of Saint Aidans church at Magilligan. In Irish

Steve Backshall explores every aspect of foxes lives, beginning with a look at the qualities that have made the red fox the worlds most widespread animal, flourishing in rural and urban environments alike and inhabiting every continent apart from Antarctica. programme.title: Live International Football
programme.desc: Czechia v Republic of Ireland (Kick-off 7.45pm). Darragh Maloney presents all the action from the semi-final at Fortuna Arena in Prague, as the sides look to move a step closer to reaching the finals in USA and Mexico. The winners of this match will host either Denmark or North Macedonia on Tuesday after both teams finished second in their groups. The Czechs could perhaps be considered slight favourites given they have home advantage, but the Republic will be determined to reach their first World Cup since 2002. With analysis from Didi Hamann and Shay Given, and commentary by Des Curran and Ronnie Whelan

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Its July 12 and the Quinns are rushing to get out of town before the Orange Parades start. They are packed and nearly ready to go when James, Michelle and Clare arrive as unexpected members of the escape party. To make matters worse, Aunt Sarah has recently started reading tarot cards and is predicting disaster for this trip - and it seems that for once, she might just be right. The only question is, when and how will things go wrong? Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Jamie-Lee ODonnell, Dylan Llewellyn and Nicola Coughlan

programme.title: Urban Secrets

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Six years later, the succession plans for Driftmark become critical, and Rhaenyra tries to strike a bargain with Rhaenys

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists help to track down Aegon, members of the Great Houses of Westeros are asked to affirm their allegiance

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries desperately to hold the realm together and Daemon prepares for war. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Paul arrives at Ginas office, nervously awaiting the verdict of the court hearing into his part in Alexs suicide. As they discuss the traumatic events he has been through over the past year, he reveals he wants to leave therapy - and though he tries to make excuses, Gina believes she knows the real reason for his decision. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Dianne Wiest

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya returns to Winterfell and is reunited with Sansa and Bran, while Daenerys takes matters into her own hands and launches a surprise attack on the Lannister army. Jaime and Bronn collect the spoils from the war with the Tyrells

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys demands loyalty from the surviving Lannister soldiers and makes an offer to the lords of Westeros, while Jon heeds Brans warning about white walkers on the move. Cersei vows to vanquish anyone or anything that stands in her way

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Winterfell, Littlefinger schemes to isolate Sansa, while tensions between Arya and her ssister increase after the discovery of a letter. Jon and his men go beyond the wall to capture a white walker, while Daenerys has to make a tough decision

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion tries to save Westeros from itself as everyone meets in Kings Landing to discuss the fate of the realm, Sansa confronts Arya, while Sam reaches Winterfell, where he and Bran discover a shocking secret about Jon

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Wall, which has protected the Seven Kingdoms for 8,000 years, has fallen, and the Night Kings army of the dead marches towards Westeros. Meanwhile, Jon and Daenerys arrive in Winterfell, and the Stark children are reunited. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After arriving at Winterfell, Jaime Lannister is confronted with the consequences of his past mistakes. programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Night King and the army of the dead reach Winterfell, and an epic battle between the living and the dead begins. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: After the Battle of Winterfell, the Great War to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros continues as Jon and Daenerys look to the south. Meanwhile, Jon shares a secret with his siblings. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Varys betrays his queen, and Daenerys brings her forces to Kings Landing as the explosive final battle for the Iron Throne begins. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The final episode of the fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels. The Great War to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros continues. programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda tries to redirect Tanyas focus to her business proposal, Paula grows increasingly disillusioned with the Mossbachers, and Rachel begins to question her future

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: The Bear

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahls book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League (2015)
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis (2018)
programme.desc: Siren steals the Book of Legends to locate the Trident of Atlantis so she can reign supreme over the ocean. Animation with the voice of Yvette Nicole Brown

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potters stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom (1984)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist, with his young sidekick and a nightclub singer in tow, is stranded in India, where he takes on a mission to recover magical sacred stones from the hands of an evil cult engaged in human sacrifice and child slavery. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Harrison Ford, Kate Capshaw, Ke Huy Quan and Amrish Puri

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
programme.desc: The intrepid archaeologist sets out to find his estranged father, who has gone missing while searching for the Holy Grail. Once reunited, the duo team up to finish the task and locate the sacred relic before the Nazis get their hands on it. Action adventure sequel directed by Steven Spielberg, the third instalment in the successful franchise. Harrison Ford stars, alongside Sean Connery, Alison Doody, River Phoenix, Julian Glover and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage (2021)
programme.desc: Struggling to cope with his alter ego Venom, Eddie Brock attempts to re-ignite his journalistic career by interviewing serial killer Cletus Kasady. However, Kasady becomes the host of the symbiote Carnage and escapes prison after a failed execution. Comic-book fantasy sequel, directed by Andy Serkis and starring Tom Hardy, Woody Harrelson and Michelle Williams

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance (2024)
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock and symbiote partner-in-crime Venom are lying low in Mexico City, on the run for the apparent murder of detective Patrick Mulligan. The cop and his bonded entity, Toxin, are actually alive at the Imperium symbiote containment programme, beneath the Area 51 US Air Force facility in the Nevada desert. Knull, the symbiotes immortal creator, dispatches hunters to locate Venoms hidden power source, the Codex, which can set Knull free to terrorise the multiverse. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Stephen Graham and Juno Temple

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Combat Machines
